title: OMS Bundle
description:
JSON Schema for a complete OMS bundle file (current format, v1.1.0+). An OMS bundle is a Sigstore Bundle containing a DSSE envelope with an OMS in-toto Statement.

This schema validates the CURRENT normative format. Older bundle versions (pre-v1.1.0) may not pass this schema; see spec.md §11 for version history and verifier relaxations.

Fields owned by Sigstore (verificationMaterial internals, tlogEntries, timestampVerificationData) are structurally validated here but their semantics are governed by:
  - Sigstore Bundle:     https://github.com/sigstore/protobuf-specs/blob/main/protos/sigstore_bundle.proto
  - Sigstore Common:     https://github.com/sigstore/protobuf-specs/blob/main/protos/sigstore_common.proto
  - Sigstore Rekor:      https://github.com/sigstore/protobuf-specs/blob/main/protos/sigstore_rekor.proto

mediaType.description: Sigstore bundle media type. Versioning is governed by the Sigstore bundle spec (sigstore_bundle.proto).

verification_material.description: Sigstore VerificationMaterial. Structure is defined by sigstore_bundle.proto#VerificationMaterial. Contents depend on the signing method (key, certificate, or sigstore). See spec.md §4.1.

anyOf.description: Key-based signing: publicKey required. No Sigstore infrastructure involved, so tlogEntries and timestampVerificationData are not expected. Per sigstore_common.proto#PublicKeyIdentifier.

Certificate-based signing: x509CertificateChain required. No Sigstore infrastructure involved, so tlogEntries and timestampVerificationData are not expected. Per sigstore_common.proto#X509CertificateChain.

Sigstore keyless: short-lived Fulcio certificate + transparency log + optional RFC 3161 timestamps. tlogEntries is required (at least one entry). Per sigstore_common.proto#X509Certificate and sigstore_rekor.proto#TransparencyLogEntry.

public_key_identifier.description: Per sigstore_common.proto#PublicKeyIdentifier. Current bundles use 'hint'; older bundle versions used 'rawBytes'.

hint.description: Key identifier hint (e.g., hex-encoded key fingerprint).

rawBytes.description: Base64-encoded public key bytes (older bundle versions).

tlog_entries.description: Transparency log entries. Per sigstore_rekor.proto#TransparencyLogEntry. Required only for the sigstore method (MUST contain at least one entry). For key/certificate methods this field is not expected and MAY be absent entirely. Semantics and verification logic are defined by Sigstore, not OMS.

transparency_log_entry.description: A single Rekor transparency log entry. Per sigstore_rekor.proto#TransparencyLogEntry. OMS validates structural presence of fields; their verification semantics are governed by Sigstore.

integratedTime.description: Unix timestamp when the entry was integrated into the log.
